mechanism: Distinct moral emotions are collapsed into one moral intensity variable
possible_dampener: Model guilt shame disgust compassion and elevation separately

mechanism: Guilt and shame are treated as the same feeling
possible_dampener: Distinguish act-focused responsibility from global self-condemnation

mechanism: Responsibility is felt where agency was limited or absent
possible_dampener: Clarify actual responsibility and available repair

mechanism: Exposure becomes total self-condemnation or social destruction
People or groups are treated as contaminating or less than human
possible_dampener: Recenter dignity evidence and concrete harm

mechanism: Concern flows only toward familiar favored or visible groups
possible_dampener: Use institutions and testimony to widen moral attention

mechanism: Repeated suffering exposure overwhelms care capacity
Elevation idealizes the exemplar and replaces practice
possible_dampener: Translate admiration into concrete habits and accountability

mechanism: Anger disgust and shame become rewarding in themselves
possible_dampener: Slow judgment and require proportional action

mechanism: Organizations or media manipulate emotion for power attention or image
possible_dampener: Audit emotional climates incentives and accountability pathways

mechanism: Feeling substitutes for material repair or care
possible_dampener: Require action restitution resource commitment and follow-through
